pr.title: refactor: rename native_ui to dashboard_ui and remove stale error variants
pr.body: ## Summary Internal naming cleanup: rename the legacy "native UI" module to "dashboard UI" and remove dead error variants from the pre-embedded-Trippy era. Also fixes a pre-existing CI fuzz gate failure. No public CLI behavior changes. ## Why The internal module `native_ui.rs` and its type `NativeUiApp` use "native" terminology that implies this is the primary/native UI, when it's actually the experimental dashboard fallback. This causes confusion when reading the codebase. Similarly, `MtrError::TrippyNotFound`, `TrippyInstallFailed`, and `TrippyExecutionFailed` are leftover from before Trippy was embedded (v1.1.3) — no code constructs them and they will never fire since Trippy is now a library dependency, not an external binary. ## Changes - [x] Code changes - [x] Tests added/updated - [x] Documentation updated **Renames (no public CLI change):** - `src/native_ui.rs` → `src/dashboard_ui.rs` - `NativeUiApp` → `DashboardApp` - `run_native_ui()` → `run_dashboard_ui()` **Dead code removal:** - Remove `MtrError::TrippyNotFound`, `TrippyInstallFailed`, `TrippyExecutionFailed` (Trippy is embedded since v1.1.3) - Remove corresponding `From` match arms in `api_error.rs` - Remove stale `problem_type()` URL mappings for removed error codes - Replace `TrippyExecutionFailed` test with `IoError` coverage **New tests:** - `default_ui_is_the_default_preset` — verifies default UI preset when no `--ui` flag - `ui_mode_from_cli_maps_all_presets` — verifies all three UiPreset→UiMode mappings **CI fix:** - Fix `ci.yml` security-audit job: install `nightly-2025-06-23` for `cargo-fuzz` (matching `security.yml`), since `cargo fuzz` requires nightly for `-Zsanitizer=address` **Docs fix:** - Fix pre-existing markdownlint violation in `DEVELOPMENT.md:128` (double blank line) ## Testing ```bash cargo check --workspace # PASS cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings # PASS ``` CI: 24/24 checks pass (including the previously-broken fuzz regression gate). ## Compatibility / Risk Notes - CLI compatibility impact: **None** — `--ui dashboard`, `--ui native` alias, `--ui enhanced` all work identically - Output/report format impact: **None** - Operational risk and rollback plan: Zero risk — internal renames only, no behavioral changes ## Security Considerations Removed stale API error mappings for `probe_backend_unavailable`, `probe_backend_install_failed`, `probe_execution_failed` problem types. These were never triggered (no code constructed the underlying `MtrError` variants). Existing API error contract for all live error paths is preserved. ## Checklist - [x] I followed the contribution guidelines in `CONTRIBUTING.md` - [x] I ran relevant checks locally - [x] I updated docs/changelog as needed - [x] I confirmed no sensitive data is included Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/871fb66468ba497e98d69036cb2a90fc Requested by: @benjisho ---
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
